comment: Versioned subcontract payment terms (ADR-0003, SC-S2) — the §2.5 retention model + payment-application cadence. Integer basis points, no floats. These are the DEFAULTS a new subcontract inherits (retainage_bp lands on the subcontracts row); the fixed §2.5 clause language lives in the terms body (a different retention requires a new subcontract_body version, not a config edit here). Bump config_version on any change.
